note: V2 acceptance floor for Phase 14 FT-012 (FIDL-03). Committed summary counts — NOT the full graph_data.json dumps (those remain gitignored). Missing this file is a HARD FAILURE in FT-012 (a skippable gate is no gate). Drug-discovery scenarios are seeded with conservative floors drawn from the current V2 regression run (see 14-04-SUMMARY.md); the human checkpoint (Plan 14-04 Task 3) reviews these against a fresh run and either approves or records updated numbers before merging. The contract scenario carries the D-14 floor (>=341 nodes / >=663 edges) unchanged until the human checkpoint records observed post-Phase-14 counts from a contract regeneration run.
